context: Evaluates the use of crypto-browserify's createHash API to compute hash digests. The solution should correctly use createHash with update() and digest() methods supporting multiple algorithms and output encodings.

checklist.name: Uses createHash
checklist.description: The solution calls createHash(algorithm) from crypto-browserify to create a hash object, not a manual or third-party implementation.

checklist.name: Calls update()
checklist.description: The solution calls hash.update(message) to feed the input data to the hash object.

checklist.name: Calls digest()
checklist.description: The solution calls hash.digest(encoding) to finalize and return the hash in the requested encoding (hex, base64, etc.).

checklist.name: Correct default encoding
checklist.description: When no encoding is provided, the solution defaults to 'hex' encoding.

checklist.name: Algorithm passthrough
checklist.description: The algorithm parameter is passed directly to createHash, supporting any algorithm name (sha256, md5, sha1, etc.) without hardcoding.
